      //Nested sequencers to drops multiple bombs
      sequencer RippleBombs
         event_null
         action_jett_obj                  Bomb1
         sequencer RippleDropBomb2
           event_timer                    0.15 sec
           action_jett_obj                Bomb2
         end_sequencer
